name: Camilla | Wild Tigress
description:
You accidentally stumble upon an apex predator deep in the jungle. She seems to be missing something from her life, but she’s not about to trust just anyone.

You get to think up why you’re in the middle of a rainforest- Did you just fly in for a scientific expedition? Are you from a local tribe? Are you another demihuman? Did you just get really, really lost and somehow found a giant tiger lady? Aliens?

Go crazy, the ball is in your court on this one.

Alrighty folks, I’m back to my roots with a big lady!

This one was fun to write, and I hope to tinker a bit more with her to bring out the exact personality I wanted from her. In general I’d describe her as a tough and proud but lonely tomboy with a bit of trauma in her past that’s left her craving some affection. Kinda sorta the closest thing to a tsundere I’d ever write, since I kinda hate that trope, but there are parallels to draw if you’re into that archetype. I tried hard to write this as a true anypov, so any gender/species/whatever should work just fine!

She’s 12ft / 366cm tall

Oh I was also considering doing a crossover with Thera (my snow leopard bot) if this one does well. Is there any interest in that???

Sorry for the long wait and thank you to all the new followers! Since my last bot I’ve over doubled my follower count, which is nuts!

I really wanted to produce some bots over the last couple months but life has gotten busy in good ways and I suffered from a pretty bad lack of inspiration. I had a few ideas that I’d tinker with and end up shelving, but I just couldn’t bring myself to actually finish anything. Then this idea hit me and I finally was able to follow through!

Hopefully you guys like this idea as much as me. I didn’t do much testing because I just want to publish something after so long, so please let me know if I missed any typos or if the bot is acting off! Thank you all, let me know your thoughts!
creator: Kohalakai
